rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.191, which governs accident, liability, and automobile insurance for career and technology programs. No overlap exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may obtain accident, liability, or automobile insurance coverage
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses insurance coverage for CTE programs and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
